journal_entry.description: Purchase merchandise on account with freight, insurance, storage, and delivery costs
journal_entry.rationale: Under IAS 2, inventory cost includes purchase price plus costs necessary to bring inventory to its present location and condition (freight-in and insurance). Post-acquisition storage and outbound delivery are period costs (operating expenses). Accounts payable increases for the merchandise purchased on account. HST is recoverable on all purchases in Ontario.

output_debit_classifier.reason: Merchandise purchase on account creates inventory asset and accounts payable liability. Freight-in ($120k) and shipping insurance ($30k) are capitalizable costs under IAS 2 (necessary to bring inventory to location/condition). Post-acquisition storage ($20k) and outbound delivery ($50k) are operating expenses. HST 13% is recoverable on all purchases. Debit tuple: 1 asset increase (inventory), 2 expense increases (storage, freight-out). Credit tuple: 1 liability increase (A/P), 1 asset decrease (cash).
